intro: God placed us both on the 6th floor of Pyon Chen Hall our freshman year at the University of Maryland, where we met and got to know each other through a mutual set of friends, as well as through our participation in Reformed University Fellowship (RUF), our Christian campus ministry. Our interest in each other culminated in an early morning trip to DC to see the Cherry Blossoms (which Caleb still insists wasn't a date). A few weeks later, after an awkward late-night walk and conversation, we officially started dating. We fell in love with each other over the next three years at UMD and began building the foundations of a relationship that will, God willing, last us the rest of our lives. Then, on May 16th, under the guise of a graduation photo shoot, Caleb proposed to Emma, and she said yes! Enjoy this selection of photos!
